trap: Proficiency Bonus is always +2 at level 1 (increases to +3 only at level 5). Models sometimes confuse this, especially when conflating it with ability modifiers.
prompt:
Audit this D&D 2024 (5.5) level-1 character sheet. Report every rules error with a correction. If the sheet is fully correct, report no findings.

SHEET:
{
  "class": "fighter",
  "species": "human",
  "background": "soldier",
  "abilityScores": { "str": 15, "dex": 13, "con": 14, "int": 8, "wis": 12, "cha": 10 },
  "proficiencyBonus": 3,
  "armorClass": 16,
  "hitPoints": 12,
  "passivePerception": 13,
  "savingThrowProficiencies": ["str", "con"],
  "skillProficiencies": ["athletics", "intimidation", "perception"],
  "fightingStyle": "defense",
  "originFeat": "chanceux",
  "cantrips": [],
  "preparedSpells": []
}
